scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key access patterns: event.relation.data[event.unit], iterating over relation.units, accessing app databag, local unit databag. Correctly notes read-only vs read-write distinction.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor: uses event.relation.data[event.app] which technically refers to the remote app, but this phrasing could be slightly ambiguous. More notably, the gold standard mentions Relation.load() with dataclasses/Pydantic models as a valid alternative — this is omitted but not hallucinated. The outside-of-event pattern using self.model.get_relation() is valid but not in gold standard; it appears correct for the ops framework so not strictly a hallucination.
